response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a credit scroll for a Hololive Countdown Live event, displaying song titles and performers.
2. Extracted representative song titles ('RENEGADE', 'Shiny Smily Story', 'Our Bright Parade') and their credited Hololive performers.
3. Searched for lyrics using the template: "[Song Title] Hololive Japanese and English lyrics".
4. Successfully retrieved lyrics for the selected songs.
5. Constructed JSON with scene breakdown based on the time segments where these song titles were highlighted in the credits.
response.global_summary: A credits roll for a Hololive Production Countdown Live event featuring a medley of numerous original songs by various Hololive talents.

scenes.description: The video begins with the song title 'RENEGADE' displayed on screen along with the performers Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Gigi Murin, Cecilia Immergreen, and Raora Panthera.
scenes.performer_in_video: Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Gigi Murin, Cecilia Immergreen, Raora Panthera
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Tame the fire and fall
Into the heart of the storm
Don't come to my domain
And tell me what to do
A mass aftermath
If you attempt to detain me
I'll break the chains...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Tame the fire and fall
Into the heart of the storm
Don't come to my domain
And tell me what to do
A mass aftermath
If you attempt to detain me
I'll break the chains...

scenes.description: The song 'Shiny Smily Story' is displayed on screen along with performers Tokino Sora, Roboco, AZKi, and Sakura Miko.
scenes.performer_in_video: Tokino Sora, Roboco, AZKi, Sakura Miko
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
キミの笑顔は魔法さ
キラキラ輝く粉みたい
涙は見せないよ
絶望も越えて
Shiny, smiley story
手をつないで夢まで
Wonder story, ready to scream?
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Your precious smile is like a spell
A magic dust that makes me smile
You'll never see my tears
We defeat despairs
'Cause it's my shiny, smiley life!
We took our hands towards our brightest dreams
Wonder story, ready to scream?

scenes.description: The song 'Our Bright Parade' is displayed on screen along with the performers AZKi, Sakura Miko, Aki Rosenthal, Akai Haato, and others.
scenes.performer_in_video: AZKi, Sakura Miko, Aki Rosenthal, Akai Haato, Fubuki Shirakami, Natsuiro Matsuri, Nakiri Ayame, Yuzuki Choco, Oozora Subaru, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
パレードは始まる、僕らのブライトパレード
選んだ未来へ行こう
光が照らす、僕らはここにいる
一緒に、一つに輝いて！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The parade is starting, our bright parade
Let's go, to the future we choose
The light shines on us, we are here
Together, shining as one!
